data.title: French Company Capital B Increases Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: French publicly traded company Capital B has increased its Bitcoin holdings by 6 BTC, bringing its total to 2,943 BTC. According to Foresight News, this move reflects the company's ongoing interest in cryptocurrency investments.

data.title: The AI-generated image of Jesus depicting Trump may have been the main motive for the attack at the White House press conference; the suspect had previously cited scripture to denounce Trump as an "antichrist."
data.description: According to information disclosed by journalist Ken Klippenstein, the attack on Cole Allen, the suspect in the White House press conference, may be related to the AI-generated image of Jesus released by Trump. Information shows that Cole Allen, a Protestant, had previously used the image to quote the Book of Revelation about the "Antichrist" on social media. Although Trump claimed that Cole Allen hated Christians, his manifesto shows that Allen was actually using biblical teachings to justify his violence, claiming that remaining silent when others are oppressed violates faith. Cole Allen graduated from Caltech and worked on precision hardware development related to drones and military targeting systems. The FBI is currently investigating whether he acted alone.

data.title: An APE insider suffered a loss of $194,000, closing out $4.58 million in LDO long positions.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, APE insiders have closed out their long positions of 10.26 million LDO tokens (worth approximately $4.58 million), without making a profit and incurring a loss of approximately $194,000.

data.title: NFT Market Sees Mixed Performance Amid Decline in Sales
data.description: Pudgy Penguins experienced a notable increase of over 20% within a week, while Bored Ape Yacht Club (BAYC) surged by 81% over the past 30 days, despite a general downturn in the NFT market. According to NS3.AI, data from CryptoSlam indicates that global NFT sales decreased to approximately $175 million in April, down from $304 million in February. Additionally, both transactions and active users saw a reduction of nearly 50%. However, average sale prices more than doubled month over month, suggesting that capital is concentrating on higher-value blue-chip trades rather than signaling a broad market recovery.

data.title: Germany's May Gfk Consumer Confidence Index Falls Short of Expectations
data.description: Germany's Gfk Consumer Confidence Index for May was reported at -33.3, according to Jin10. This figure fell short of the expected -29.3. The previous value was revised from -28 to -28.1.

data.title: Bored Ape Yacht Club NFTs Purchased for 35 ETH by User 'FilmStar'
data.description: User 'FilmStar' has acquired two Bored Ape Yacht Club NFTs for a total of 35 ETH, equivalent to $81,500. According to NS3.AI, OpenSea data reveals that BAYC#5617 was purchased for 10 ETH, while BAYC#4593 was bought for 25 ETH.

data.title: A whale placed buy orders for nearly 795 BTC, worth approximately $61.77 million, with the initial target of "ten major targets".
data.description: The whale "Set Ten Big Targets First" placed two limit buy orders, for 397.769 BTC and 397.718 BTC respectively, totaling approximately 795.49 BTC, at a price of $77,686.5, with a total value of approximately $61.77 million.

data.title: User "FilmStar" spent 35 ETH to buy 2 BAYC, worth $81,500.
data.description: According to the OpenSea page, two hours ago, a user address named FilmStar spent 35 ETH to purchase 2 BAYC tokens, worth $81,500. BAYC#5617 was sold for 10 ETH, and BAYC#4593 for 25 ETH. This address currently holds 1.3 million USDC. Some users speculate that this user may be a South Korean pop music star.

data.title: Rival Firms Collaborate on Investment Strategy
data.description: According to PANews, two traditionally competitive firms have recently joined forces to make a significant investment. This collaboration marks a notable shift in their usual competitive dynamic, suggesting a strategic move to leverage combined resources for mutual benefit. The partnership aims to capitalize on emerging market opportunities, reflecting a broader trend of cooperation among industry rivals. This development highlights the evolving landscape of business strategies where collaboration is increasingly seen as a viable path to success.

data.title: Binance to Revise Referral Commission Calculation for Spot and Futures
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to update its referral commission calculation method for Spot and Futures trading. The changes will be implemented on two separate dates: Spot trading will see the update starting from 2026-04-29, while Futures trading will follow on 2026-05-19. The revised calculation will be based on net fees, which are defined as transactional income after deducting any applicable market maker rebates. This adjustment aims to ensure that commission payouts more accurately reflect the actual net fees generated by transactions.

Binance has clarified that no action is required from users, as the changes will be automatically implemented and reflected in future commission payouts. The update is designed to provide a more precise calculation of referral commissions, aligning them with the net fees generated. This move is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to enhance the accuracy and fairness of its commission structures. Users are advised to note the effective dates for Spot and Futures trading to understand when the new calculation method will take effect. The announcement underscores Binance's commitment to maintaining transparency and efficiency in its operations.

data.title: Inflation in US Food and Beverage Sector Hits 7.9% in March
data.description: Inflation in the U.S. food and beverage sector surged by 7.9% year over year in March, marking the largest increase in at least 12 months. According to NS3.AI, this rise is partly attributed to the doubling of urea prices since February, reaching approximately $900 per metric ton, thereby increasing pressure on farm input costs. Additionally, reports from Baker Hughes and a Dallas Fed survey indicate that ongoing disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz could further tighten fertilizer supply.

data.title: Jupiter Litterbox Trust Increases JUP Holdings
data.description: Jupiter Litterbox Trust has recently expanded its holdings by acquiring 356,021 JUP tokens. According to Foresight News, this purchase is valued at approximately $67,000. Throughout this month, the trust has accumulated a total of 10,123,216 JUP tokens, worth around $1.91 million. To date, the trust's total acquisition amounts to 114,226,466 JUP tokens, valued at approximately $21.65 million.

data.title: CryptoQuant CEO: Bitcoin's rise is driven by futures, on-chain spot demand remains negative.
data.description: CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju stated that the current Bitcoin rally is primarily driven by the futures market, while on-chain spot demand remains negative. He pointed out that historically, bear markets typically require a simultaneous recovery in both spot and futures demand to end.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Yields Rise Amid Middle East Tensions and Central Bank Meetings
data.description: U.S. Treasury yields increased during the Asian trading session on April 27, as ongoing tensions in the Middle East kept oil prices elevated. According to Jin10, aside from developments in the Middle East, the market is also focused on a series of central bank meetings this week, including the Federal Reserve's policy meeting. Elias Haddad, Global Market Strategist at Brown Brothers Harriman, stated in a report that the market widely expects the Federal Reserve to maintain the federal funds rate target range at 3.50% to 3.75% for the third consecutive meeting. He noted that the vote is expected to remain 11 to 1, with Governor Milan likely to dissent again, advocating for a 25 basis point rate cut. According to Tradeweb data, the yield on the 2-year U.S. Treasury note rose by 2.3 basis points to 3.798%, while the 10-year yield increased by 1.4 basis points to 4.323%.

data.title: Capital One Settlement Approved for Savings Account Holders
data.description: A federal judge has approved a $425 million settlement for current and former holders of Capital One's 360 Savings accounts. According to NS3.AI, the lawsuit claimed that Capital One paid lower interest rates on older 360 Savings accounts following the introduction of the higher-yield 360 Performance Savings product in 2019. Capital One has denied any wrongdoing in the matter.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 630 USDT with a 0.40% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 27, 2026, 05:23 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 630 USDT and is now trading at 629.679993 USDT, with a narrowed 0.40% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Intel Contract Prices Rise Amid Market Activity
data.description:
Intel's contract prices on Hyperliquid experienced a notable increase this morning, climbing approximately 3% to reach $85, with a current price of $84.7. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, this follows a 23.6% rise last Friday.

A trader known as 'CBB' has significantly increased their short position on Intel contracts over the weekend, doubling it to a current size of $3.15 million at an average price of $77.3. This position is currently facing a floating loss of $270,000, marking a 23.5% decline, making it the largest short position on Hyperliquid.

Additionally, the trader's address is engaged in shorting over 20 U.S. stocks with a total size of approximately $27.8 million. Due to the recent upward trend in U.S. stocks, the monthly capital has seen a pullback of $7.2 million. The address involved is 0xd8d5b0f7219aed171efb5ae2ac3b9941206f7349.

data.title: Barclays: The Fed is expected to hold rates steady this week, but a rate cut is still possible this year.
data.description: Barclays analysts stated in a report that with inflation remaining high, the Federal Reserve is expected to keep the target range for the federal funds rate unchanged at its meeting this week, but a rate cut is still possible this year. The analysts said, "In a highly uncertain environment, the Fed tends to remain on hold, with strong demand and still relatively high inflation supporting its patience, and policymakers have also signaled a diminishing confidence in further rate cuts in the near term." The analysts indicated that if inflation falls as expected, the Fed is expected to gain sufficient confidence to begin easing policy around September. "We still expect it to cut rates this year." According to LSEG data, the money market currently prices in a 10 basis point rate cut by the Fed in 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 78,000 USDT with a 0.28% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 27, 2026, 05:20 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 78,000 USDT and is now trading at 77,922.03125 USDT, with a narrowed 0.28% decrease in 24 hours.
